9780226115955  ...    ## A History of Florence and the Florentines in the Age of the Grand Dukes The city of Florence has long been admired as the home of the brilliant artistic and literary achievement of the early Renaissance. But most histories of Florence go no further than the first decades of the sixteenth century. They thus give the impression that Florentine culture suddenly died with the generation of Leonardo, Machiavelli, and Andrea del Sarto.Eric Cochrane shows that the Florentines maintained their creativity long after they had lost their position as  ...    examining a series of Florentine figures from Duke Cosimo di Medici and Galileo through the bureaucrat and reformer  ...
